quotes.text: The Hebrew word translated "burden," massa', is commonly rendered as "oracle." Usually the word refers to prophecies of doom. Thus the book of Habakkuk contains the ominous prophecy or revelation that the prophet saw and which was later recorded.
quotes.attr: Victor L. Ludlow in Kent P. Jackson, ed., Studies in Scripture, Vol. 4: 1 Kings to Malachi [Salt Lake City: Deseret Book Co., 1993], 187 - 188
